rules.name: graphics-rhi
rules.reason: Graphics changes may affect Vulkan, DX12, shader binding, resource lifetime, barriers, or backend parity.

rules.name: function-render
rules.reason: Function/Render changes may affect SceneRenderer, RenderGraph, RenderDevice facade, material submission, debug views, or frame stats.

rules.name: function-scene-asset
rules.reason: Scene or Asset changes can affect Editor-facing facade behavior and Sandbox standard scene loading.

rules.name: shader-source
rules.reason: Shader changes may affect DXC compilation, reflection, generated bindings, Vulkan SPIR-V, and DX12 DXIL.

rules.name: engine-config
rules.reason: Engine.ini controls backend, validation, VSync, and process-level render debug settings.
validation: Confirm requested backend matches runtime log
Sandbox smoke test for affected backend

rules.name: sandbox-scene
rules.reason: The standard Sandbox scene is the main shared rendering validation asset.

rules.name: editor-code
rules.reason: Editor code must stay behind Engine Function facades and must not include Graphics internals.

rules.name: build-scripts
rules.reason: Build and tooling changes can affect validation orchestration and generated reports.
validation: Run the touched tool self-test when available

rules.name: docs-only
rules.reason: Documentation changes usually need review for accuracy but not runtime validation.
